subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast severed thyself from all faces save the Face of God, abandon the multitudes and hold fast unto the Most Firm Handle [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من انقطع عن الوجوه الا وجه الله دع الوری و تمسک بالعروه الوثقی التی
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past
